Welcome!

My name is Ramsey Sheibani, and I'm a (relatively) recent graduate from UC Berkeley interested in pursuing actuarial, analyst, and trading positions. This right here is my project page, where I will be storing all of my finished projects. The website also includes writeups for all of the projects to discuss at length both my code and my thought processes during development. I will also be including some short snippets of current projects so you can get a sneak peak at what I'll be implementing in the near future.

While this website is  mainly being used to store all of my projects built from scratch, below you can see writeups for the projects I completed in UC Berkeley's CS61a and CS61b courses. In the interest of academic integrity, I will not be including any of my completed code for the projects neither here nor on my Github (with the exception of BYOW), as some of them are still being used in the courses.
